title: pixel.product.renderer.v1 Input Schema
description: Input parameters for Pixel Product Renderer. Caller provides a product description and optional rendering configuration. A product photo attachment is required. The fine-tuned rendering model, brand style pipeline, background synthesis algorithms, and post-processing chain all run on the Responder side and are never exposed.

product_description.description: A description of the product to render, including material, color, key features, and any specific rendering requirements.

background_style.description: The background environment style for the rendered output.

angle.description: Desired primary camera angle for the render.

quantity.description: Number of rendered variations to generate. Each variation may use a slightly different angle, lighting, or framing within the specified style.
